narrative:
Miami Township N (precinct in Clermont County) has 692 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
